message:
fix(runtime): Reduce assertion helper monomorphization (Phase 12)

Replace O(n²) type-pair inline comparisons with O(n) PyValue conversions:
- Add equality_ops.zig with equalViaPyValue() helper
- Simplify equalTuples() to use PyValue instead of inline for + @field
- Simplify deepEqualUnion() to use PyValue instead of inline for over fields
- Simplify equalValues() tuple comparison section

Expected impact: ~3000 monomorphizations reduced to ~100
